commands.repair_reason: Contributor or maintainer action is needed to fix the scoped-cache race, rebase the dirty branch, and refresh latest-head real behavior proof before merge.; Needs attention: The diff still has a concrete cache-integrity race in the security-sensitive models.json short-circuit path.; Review finding: [P2] Cache the validated models.json snapshot — src/agents/models-config.ts:1301-1305 (sha=fed465f46682c0f404f764bd2ce1ab37efcf608c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds content-hash-backed models/auth cache validation, a provider-scoped `targetProvider` fast path for `ensureOpenClawModelsJson`, pi embedded caller wiring, focused tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of latest PR head shows the validation path parses one `safeReadFileOutcome` snapshot, then the scoped cache records a separate `readModelsJsonContentOutcome` after validation.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer action is needed to fix the scoped-cache race, rebase the dirty branch, and refresh latest-head real behavior proof before merge.

commands.command: please re-review. round 7 commit `5fde6ac536` addresses the [p2] pass target hints from embedded callers finding: both pi-embedded production callers in compact.ts and run.ts now forward `targetprovider: provider` to `ensureopenclawmodelsjson`, so the scoped-cache short-circuit can actually fire in production runs. regression coverage added via exported `ensureopenclawmodelsjsonmock` in compact.hooks.harness.ts and two focused caller-wiring tests in compact.hooks.test.ts.
